_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure chain of custody is followed for all digital media acquired in accordance with the Federal Rules of Evidence.
reference_document_element_description: Document and maintain data lineage for critical data elements and high-risk data flows, ensuring lineage is current and accessible to authorized consumers.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-003 (DG, cosine: 0.369), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.348).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.5/10 (raw 0.345). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accordance, acquired, chain, custody, digital, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, authorized, consumers, critical, current, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.874, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ensure chain of custody is followed for all digital media acquired in accordance" and "Document and maintain data lineage for critical data elements and high-risk data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.394 ≈ STS 0.345 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accordance, acquired, chain, custody, digital, ensure]. WIDAI terms: [accessible, authorized, consumers, critical, current, data].
